ordered_steps.purpose: Re-runs the TLS pipeline through the dashboard build path and asserts the published artifact exists. --skip-next-build avoids invoking 'next build' from the live route.

ordered_steps.skip_when: scripts/build_system_graph_validation_report.py is not present in the working tree

fail_closed_rules: Pipeline halts on first failure; subsequent steps are not executed.
On failure the route returns HTTP 500 with failing_command and failure_reason populated.
Last good state on disk is preserved — the route never writes artifacts itself.
VERCEL=1 short-circuits to recompute_unavailable_signal with the exact commands an operator should run locally.
After a successful run, stale_after_recompute=true if the freshly-built priority artifact still does not load as state=ok (e.g. generated_at missing in upstream module).
